phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main entrance to the palace is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'entrée principale du palais ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lahn-TRAY prahn-SEE-pal doo pah-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Palace of the Dukes of Burgundy is the heart of Dijon. The main entrance is on Rue de la Libre Arbitre.

responses.english: On Place de la Libération, opposite the town hall.
responses.phonetic: soor lah PLAHS duh lah lee-bay-rah-SYON, ahn fahs duh lah may-REE
responses.french: Sur la Place de la Libération, en face de la mairie.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the museum inside the palace
phrases.text_local: Quel musée se trouve à l'intérieur du palais ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel myoo-ZAY suh TROOV ah lan-tay-RYUHR doo pah-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: The palace houses the Musée des Beaux-Arts, one of France's finest regional museums with excellent medieval art.

responses.english: The Museum of Fine Arts. Entry is free.
responses.phonetic: luh myoo-ZAY day boh-ZAR. lahn-TRAY eh grah-TWEET
responses.french: Le Musée des Beaux-Arts. L'entrée est gratuite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if you can climb the tower
phrases.cultural_note: The Tour Philippe le Bon offers panoramic views of Dijon. Visits must be booked through the tourist office.

responses.english: Yes, but you need to book at the tourist office.
responses.phonetic: wee, may eel foh ray-zair-VAY ah loh-FEES duh too-REESM
responses.french: Oui, mais il faut réserver à l'office de tourisme.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rooms of the Dukes are located
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les Salle des Ducs ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay sal duh DOO
phrases.cultural_note: The Rooms of the Dukes (Salles des Ducs) feature monumental 17th-century tapestries and the famous ceiling of the Oath Room.

responses.english: On the first floor, right after the staircase.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, ah DRWAHT ah-PREH les-kah-LYAY
responses.french: Au premier étage, à droite après l'escalier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the owl carving
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la chouette sculptée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah shoo-WET skool-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The owl carved into the stone is Dijon's mascot. Touching it with the left hand is said to bring good luck.

responses.english: On the north side of Notre-Dame church, Rue de la Chouette.
responses.phonetic: soor luh koh-TAY NOR duh lay-GLEEZ notr-DAHM, roo duh lah shoo-WET
responses.french: Sur le côté nord de l'église Notre-Dame, rue de la Chouette.
